SG6060/SGF6024/SG100/SG1000 & StorageGRID Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) - SG6160/SGF6112/SG110/SG1100:
Block IPv6 traffic to the BMC, unplug the BMC network port, or implement external access controls such as ACLs or firewalls to limit access to only trusted users.

StorageGRID Hardening Guide
CISA Harden Baseboard Management Controllers", "modified_date": null, "ntap_advisory_id": "NTAP-20250613-0011", "published_date": "2025-06-13T00:00:00", "updated_date": "2026-07-23T00:00:00"}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

fixed_versions: Active IQ Unified Manager for VMware vSphere: {'link': 'https://mysupport.netapp.com/site/products/all/details/activeiq-unified-manager/downloads-tab/download/62791/9.16P2', 'cves': []}
mitigations:
StorageGRID Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) - SG6060/SGF6024/SG100/SG1000 & StorageGRID Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) - SG6160/SGF6112/SG110/SG1100:
Block IPv6 traffic to the BMC, unplug the BMC network port, or implement external access controls such as ACLs or firewalls to limit access to only trusted users.

Reference documents for general BMC hardening guidance:
StorageGRID Hardening Guide
CISA Harden Baseboard Management Controllers
products: Active IQ Unified Manager for VMware vSphere
NetApp HCI Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) - H300S/H500S/H700S/H410S
NetApp HCI Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) - H410C
NetApp SolidFire & HCI Storage Node (Element Software)

title: CVE-2024-47685 Linux Kernel Vulnerability in NetApp Products
